name: Create Marine Ecosystem Poster
description:
Create a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart about a marine ecosystem and save it as marine_ecosystem.flipchart in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Flipcharts\.

Page 1: Title page with heading "Marine Food Web — Pacific Ocean Ecosystem".

Page 2 — Food Web Diagram: Arrange 8 organisms across 3 trophic levels and connect them with arrows showing feeding relationships. Producers (bottom row): Phytoplankton (green circle), Kelp (green rectangle). Primary Consumers (middle row): Zooplankton (yellow circle), Krill (orange oval), Sea Urchin (purple circle). Secondary/Top Consumers (top row): Herring (blue oval), Sea Otter (brown oval), Orca (black oval). Draw at least 12 arrows connecting organisms to show energy flow. Every organism must have at least one incoming and one outgoing connection.

Page 3 — Energy Pyramid: Three horizontally-stacked rectangles decreasing in width from bottom to top, colored green, yellow, and red respectively, labeled "Producers", "Primary Consumers", and "Top Predators". Add text "Energy decreases" beside the pyramid with an upward arrow.

Page 4 — Carbon Cycle: Six labeled shapes arranged in a circle connected by arrows forming a loop: Atmosphere → Photosynthesis → Marine Plants → Marine Animals → Decomposition → Ocean Sediments → back to Atmosphere.
